description: Square 'LABOR NEWS' card in DOL's template. The background photo shows the charred shell of a burned house with collapsed blackened roof beams and a field of rubble and broken masonry in the foreground; at right a worker in a dark jacket reading 'CALIFOR...' with a red helmet and a long red tool stands amid the wreckage. Overlaid is a small navy 'LABOR NEWS' tab and a bold white sans-serif headline on translucent navy ribbon blocks: 'Department of Labor approves up to $10M in initial funding to support disaster recovery, response to California's continuing wildfires.' A navy bar at lower right reads 'dol.gov/newsroom.'
notable_text: LABOR NEWS / Department of Labor approves up to $10M in initial funding to support disaster recovery, response to California's continuing wildfires / dol.gov/newsroom
